content.text:
<analysis>
a. Event type: Pull request synchronize trigger with direct instructions to review code
b. This is a request for code review feedback on PR #213 reviewing S. pombe aah1 gene annotations
c. Key information:
   - PR adds AI review of SCHPO aah1 (O74922) gene with 12 GO annotations
   - 8 files changed including YAML review, research notes, UniProt/GOA data, and publications
   - Core function identified as α-glucan transglycosylase for cell wall remodeling
   - Author accepted 8 annotations, kept 2 as non-core, removed 1, marked 1 as over-annotated
d. Main tasks:
   - Review YAML structure and validation
   - Check annotation decisions and supporting evidence
   - Assess code quality, potential issues, and adherence to project guidelines
   - Verify references and citations
e. Plan:
   - Read project CLAUDE.md for guidelines
   - Examine the main review file (aah1-ai-review.yaml)
   - Check supporting files (notes, research, publications)
   - Validate against schema and best practices
   - Provide constructive feedback on review quality
f. No linting/testing limitations expected for this review task
</analysis>

I'll review this pull request for code quality, potential issues, and adherence to best practices. Let me start by examining the files and understanding the project structure.

input.body: ### PR Review: SCHPO aah1 Gene Annotation Review I'll review this pull request focusing on code quality, annotation accuracy, and adherence to project guidelines. #### Todo List: - [ ] Read project guidelines from CLAUDE.md - [ ] Examine main review file structure and validation - [ ] Check annotation decisions and supporting evidence - [ ] Review supporting documentation quality - [ ] Assess references and citations - [ ] Check for potential issues or improvements - [ ] Provide comprehensive feedback [View job run](https://github.com/ai4curation/ai-gene-review/actions/runs/23521990661)
